title: Homatz Indoor Door Mat - Heavy Duty Rubber, Floor and Kitchen Mats - Non Slip, Washable and Dirt Trapper Doormats Super Absorbent Multicolor Barrier Matts 90x150cm, Grey
features: { Premium Quality } Super heavy duty runner mat is made from high quality polypropylene fibers and non slip superior rubber backing that keeps them firmly place while in use and provides both comfort and durability.

{ Versatile Uses } Simple and elegant design, suitable for integration into all home interior, decorations and can be use at places such as Kitchen, Laundry, Living room, Dining Room, Corridor, Hallway, Entryway, Launch Area, Children’s playroom, perfect for the indoor & outdoor areas having high traffic
{ Low Pile } Due to 7mm thickness, it can easily use underneath furniture and in entryways, as it won’t obstruct doorways.
{ Dirt Trapper & Moisture Absorbant } Homatz dirt trapper mat traps the dirt and absorbs the wet from your shoes, umbrella and keeps your floor clean and dry.
{ Reusable Washable Runner Rug } Runner mat is easy to clean by simply shaking out the dirt then hoover, use hose pipe, or can be brushed, vacuumed to clean it and makes it look like new again.
